creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your attempt to create an executable file with COPYTREE_SHARE by first installing the file to itself and then copying it does not work.  The file is installed with the executable bit disabled.  Instead try something like this:

    (cd ${WRKSRC}/demo && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR} "! -name keyboard")
    ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/demo/keyboard ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}/

I'll apply that fix on commit.

Test program seems to work fine.
